headline: Chip Stocks Are on Pace for Their Longest Win Streak Since 2017
summary: Here’s a stat that might knock your socks off: The PHLX Semiconductor index is on track for its longest winning streak in nearly a decade. The SOX, as the index is called on Wall Street, has risen nine days in a row.

headline: The Hidden Winners Inside SCHD - April 2026 Breakdown
summary: Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF (SCHD) has outperformed in 2026, up over 11% YTD versus a flat SPY.
